chat_messages.text:
make a resume for this job description: Job Description
The assembler position involves various assembly tasks, packaging, usage of hand tools, reading blueprints, interpreting work instructions, taping boxes, and counting inventory. The role focuses on the assembly of various size heavy-duty cases to store lighting accessories, cameras, and other related products.

Hard Skills
* Assembly
* Packaging
* Reading technical drawings and work orders
* Using hand tools
* Mechanical Assembly
* Power tools
* Lifting up to 40lbs
Job Type
This is a Contract-to-Hire position with a duration of 90 Day(s).

Work Site
This is a fully on-site position in Torrance, California.

**Pay**
1st shift 16.50
2nd shift 17.25
3rd Shift 17.75

Work Environment
The work environment is clean and well-organized. The tasks require handling of heavy-duty cases of varying sizes.


About Aerotek:
We know that a company's success starts with its employees. We also know that an individual's success starts with the right career opportunity. As a Best of Staffing® Client and Talent leader, Aerotek's people-focused approach yields competitive advantage for our clients and rewarding careers for our contract employees. Since 1983, Aerotek has grown to become a leader in recruiting and staffing services. With more than 250 non-franchised offices, Aerotek's 8,000 internal employees serve more than 300,000 contract employees and 18,000 clients every year. Aerotek is an Allegis Group company, the global leader in talent solutions. Learn more at Aerotek.com.
The company is an equal opportunity employer and will consider all applications without regards to race, sex, age, color, religion, national origin, veteran status, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information or any characteristic protected by law.

```
John Doe
1234 Main Street, Torrance, CA 90501

OBJECTIVE
Dedicated and detail-oriented assembler seeking a position with a reputable company to utilize my skills in assembly, packaging, and inventory management.

SKILLS
• Assembly and packaging of heavy-duty cases
• Proficient in reading blueprints and work instructions
• Experienced with hand and power tools
• Mechanical assembly
• Inventory counting and management
• Ability to lift up to 40 lbs
• Attention to detail and quality control

WORK EXPERIENCE

Assembler | XYZ Manufacturing | Torrance, CA | 2018 - Present
• Assembled various products according to blueprints and work orders
• Operated hand and power tools to complete assembly tasks
• Packaged finished products and prepared them for shipping
• Performed quality checks to ensure products met specifications
• Maintained a clean and organized work area

Warehouse Associate | ABC Logistics | Carson, CA | 2016 - 2018
• Managed inventory and conducted regular counts
• Packed and labeled products for shipment
• Operated forklifts and pallet jacks to move materials
• Assisted in assembling products as needed

EDUCATION
High School Diploma | Torrance High School | Torrance, CA | 2016

CERTIFICATIONS
• OSHA Safety Certification
• Forklift Operator Certification

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

• Willing to work overtime as needed
• Reliable transportation to Torrance work site
```

create an ideal resume as formatted but using the relevant information from the  resume i have provided
